@everyone

Never Alone Mission 2 - Ending November 30

Mission 2 of Never Alone ends ! 

Don't forget to complete as many quests as possible and turn XP into Mission 2 memories. Here's a reminder of the exclusive Star Atlas loot awaiting you with this mission's memories. 

 | https://zealy.io/c/staratlas-never-alone/questboard
